title: Provanto Smart Bug Killer, 1L - Fast Acting Bug Killer Spray - Stops Pests In 1 Hour - Insect Repellant - Contact And Systemic Insecticide With 8 Weeks Protection
features: BUG KILLER: A revolutionary new systemic bug killer that provides unmatched 8 Weeks Protection against Aphids
EFFECTIVE FORMULA: Extremely fast acting, stopping pests in just 1 hour, with visible results within 24 hours
EFFECTIVE AGAINST: Controls Aphids, Leaf-Hoppers, Scale Insects, Whiteflies and much more
SUITABLE FOR: Suitable for use outdoors on ornamentals and edibles, in greenhouses and under glass
HOW TO USE: Use at the first sign of infestation for best results
description: From the manufacturer LONGER LASTING PROTECTION Works systemically from inside the plant, to control any further attack from aphids for up to 8 weeks FAST ACTING SOLUTION Gardeners can see visible results within 24 hours of initial use. RAPID RESULTS Pests such as aphids, whiteflies, scale insects and lily beetles stop feeding after 1 hour.
